name: Control Plane / Execution Plane Separation
objective: Separate planning, routing, approvals, state, cost, audit, and any future bounded execution without treating governance as permission.
non_goals: No auto attack, scan, credential acquisition, exploit, lateral movement, persistence, data theft, infinite loop, or concurrent execution.
inputs: Future approved task contract, explicit permission contract, budget, and isolated synthetic fixture.
outputs: Future control-plane decision record and execution-plane interface specification.

read: Future approved synthetic fixture and task contract

excluded_patterns: Agent-swarm, code-review, and loop patterns are only partial governance mappings and do not authorize a runtime.
known_gaps: The proposal is restricted, locked, and does not create agents, workers, or an executor.
